name: Drumlins
about: Drumlins is a golf simulator venue that offers indoor golf experiences. The facility provides a range of services for golfers looking to practice, play, or socialize. The venue is designed to accommodate both casual players and those serious about improving their game, with a focus on technology and customer experience.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced simulator technology for accurate ball tracking
Professional coaching services available for skill improvement
Flexible pricing options to suit different needs
Private rooms for exclusive events or focused practice
Social atmosphere with food and drink options

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience, but rental clubs may be available upon request.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted, as the venue offers an on-site menu and bar options.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes around 2-3 hours depending on the simulator software and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue welcomes families, but specific amenities for children are not detailed. It is advisable to contact the venue directly for more information.
